name: Technical Docs
description: Optimized for API documentation and technical reference material.

preview.sampleText: Clean, structured layout optimized for API and technical documentation.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 pb-2 border-b-2 border-blue-500
classes.h2: text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 pb-1 border-b border-gray-200
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-gray-200 p-2 bg-gray-100 font-semibold text-gray-800 text-left
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-yellow-400 pl-4 my-4 text-gray-700 bg-yellow-50 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-red-600
